notes: Chunk 30 complete 2026-06-05. Template A (Field Manual), Tier A. 25 routes: UK and US outbound to 13 priority destinations (Israel, Pakistan, Bangladesh, Colombia, Chile, Peru, Morocco, Ghana, Ethiopia, Jordan, Nepal, Sri Lanka, Nigeria). Key data corrections applied: Sri Lanka 30-day home quarantine at owner premises (not facility); Israel UK no titre test but US requires FAVN titre test; Colombia no import permit for personal pets; Chile apostille on USDA cert required. Routes 5297 -> 5322, pages 6083 -> 6109. Tier A remaining: 165 -> 140. Blog Day 6 (pet-transport-europe-to-uk) also complete: 2400-word article, AHC for EU-to-GB, EU passports not accepted, tapeworm 24-120h window, Eurotunnel/ferry/cargo, rescue dog IPAFFS rules, costs. Next chunk 31 (Template B, Visual Journey, Tier A). Blog Day 7 next.

counts.note: total_site_pages counts content .md source files. The full deployed total (including Hugo taxonomy and list pages) is verified from sitemap.xml after a build.

counts_method: Reconciled from disk by verify_build_state.py. Never hand-edit count fields; run 'python verify_build_state.py --write' instead.
